_meta.author: Ali-Hussein-dev
_meta.title: Card with Ellipsis Pattern
_meta.description:
A versatile card component featuring an elegant ellipsis dot pattern background and gradient overlay. The distinctive dot pattern creates a subtle yet engaging visual texture, making it perfect for feature highlights, pricing cards, or any content that needs sophisticated visual emphasis.

Features

- Elegant ellipsis dot pattern background
- Distinct patterns for dark/light modes
- Smooth gradient overlay for better text readability
- Responsive design
- Dark/Light mode support with different dot colors
- Built with shadcn/ui theme system
- Framer Motion entrance animation
